notes: No wall-clock thresholds are used as pass/fail criteria.
Metrics are derived from observed SSE event counts/types under controlled bus publications in test/server/event-sse.test.ts.

scenarios.test: session+type filters deliver only relevant/control events under noisy bus traffic
scenarios.evidence: Session/type filters suppress irrelevant noisy events while preserving control and matching events.

scenarios.test: without filters stream delivers all published events (baseline count)
scenarios.evidence: Baseline confirms no-filter stream includes all published event types used in scenario.

summary.non_flaky_design: Observed event type/count assertions only; no timing thresholds.
